nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Morus Alba Bark/Ulmus Davidiana (Bark/Root)/Paeonia Albiflora Flower/Xanthium Strumarium Fruit/Sophora Japonica (Fruit/Root)/Sasa Veitchii Leaf/(Corydalis Turtschaninovii/Pueraria Lobata) Root/Humulus Japonicus Stem/Eclipta Prostrata Extract
chemicalDescription: Morus Alba Bark/Ulmus Davidiana (Bark/Root)/Paeonia Albiflora Flower/Xanthium Strumarium Fruit/Sophora Japonica (Fruit/Root)/Sasa Veitchii Leaf/(Corydalis Turtschaninovii/Pueraria Lobata) Root/Humulus Japonicus Stem/Eclipta Prostrata Extract is the extract of the bark of Morus alba, the bark and roots of Ulmus davidiana, the flowers of Paeonia albiflora, the fruit of Xanthium strumarium, the fruit and roots of Sophora japonica, the leaves of Sasa veitchii, the roots of Corydalis turtshaninovii and Pueraria lobata, the stems of Humulus japonicus, and the whole plant of Eclipta prostrata. The accepted scientific name for Paeonia albiflora is Paeonia lactiflora, the accepted scientific name for Sophora japonica is Styphnolobium japonicum, the accepted scientific name for Pueraria lobata is Pueraria montana, and the accepted scientific name for Humulus japonicus is Humulus scandens.
inciName: MORUS ALBA BARK/ULMUS DAVIDIANA (BARK/ROOT)/PAEONIA ALBIFLORA FLOWER/XANTHIUM STRUMARIUM FRUIT/SOPHORA JAPONICA (FRUIT/ROOT)/SASA VEITCHII LEAF/(CORYDALIS TURTSCHANINOVII/PUERARIA LOBATA) ROOT/HUMULUS JAPONICUS STEM/ECLIPTA PROSTRATA EXTRACT
